name: Navy Beat Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds Italian sausage, cut into 1/4-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak beans in 2 quarts of water overnight; drain.
2. Place the soaked beans in a large saucepan and add the remaining water. Bring to a boil.
3. Continue boiling for 2 minutes. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 60-70 minutes or until the beans are tender. Drain the beans.
4. In a Dutch oven, brown the sausage over medium heat.
5. Add broth, onion, carrots, corn, parsley, Italian seasoning, and the cooked beans to the Dutch oven.
6. Cover and bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
7. Uncover and bake an additional 30 minutes or until bubbly.
Yield: 8-10 servings.
